semanticCore: City life, civilization, settling down, or urban center
quranicRelevance: The city/town (al-Madinah - e.g., the city of Pharaoh or Medina), and cities (Madain).

keyDerivations.meaning: City, town, urban center, or province

figurativeOrRareUsages: وَجَاءَ رَجُلٌ مِنْ أَقْصَى المَدِينَةِ يَسْعَى: And there came a man from the farthest end of the city running.
summaryEn: The root refers to cities and towns, depicting urban setups, social centers, and the specific city locations of scriptural stories.
summaryAr: يشير هذا الجذر إلى المدن والتحضر، واصفاً التجمعات الحضرية ومواقع الأحداث التاريخية للرسالات.
rawText:
مَيْدَانٌ : see art. ميد.
هُوَ ٱبْنُ مَدِينَتِهَا , said of a skilful guide: see بَجْدَةٌ.
